title: KGSL DRAWCTXT_CREATE Differential Forensics
summary: DRAWCTXT_CREATE EINVAL was caused by flags=0x23 containing KGSL_CONTEXT_TRASH_STATE (0x20) which this kernel rejects. Turnip uses flags=0x13 (SAVE_GMEM|NO_GMEM_ALLOC|PREAMBLE) which succeeds.
rejected_hypotheses: Bionic ioctl ABI mismatch (unsigned vs unsigned long)
fd state dependency (fresh fd works with correct flags)
ioctl sequence dependency (no prior ioctls needed)

interposer_findings.LD_PRELOAD_ioctl: Captured our calls but NOT Turnip's (dlopen PLT binding order)
interposer_findings.syscall_intercept: Also missed Turnip (not using syscall() wrapper)
interposer_findings.turnip_drawctxt_invisible: Turnip's DRAWCTXT_CREATE not captured by interposer due to dlopen PLT resolution

next_steps: Apply fix to kgsl_pipe.c in Mesa build
Rebuild Rusticl with corrected context flags
